site_settings.title: Site Settings
site_settings.field_title_help: The name of your site, displayed in the browser tab and header.
site_settings.field_description_help: A short description of your site for search engines.
site_settings.field_demo_content_help: Show sample stories and objects for first-time visitors.
site_settings.field_theme_help: Choose a color theme for your site.
site_settings.field_logo_help: URL to your site logo image.
site_settings.field_language_help: Primary language for your site interface.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.field_url_help: The full URL where your site is hosted (e.g. https://username.github.io).
hosting.field_baseurl_help: The path after the domain (e.g. /my-telar-site). Leave empty if hosted at root.

story_interface.title: Story Interface
story_interface.field_show_story_steps_help: Display a progress indicator showing which step the reader is on.
story_interface.field_show_object_credits_help: Display source and credit information for objects.

collection_interface.title: Collection Interface
collection_interface.field_featured_count_help: Number of featured objects to display.

story_protection.title: Story Protection
story_protection.field_story_key_help: Set a password to restrict access to stories. Leave empty for public access.

google_sheets.title: Google Sheets Integration
google_sheets.disabled_notice: Google Sheets has been disabled. The compositor manages your content directly.
google_sheets.enabled_notice: Google Sheets is currently the content source. Changes made here will be overwritten on next sync.
